title: ferula negevensis
intro: Ferula negevensis, also known as the Negev Ferula, is a species of plant in the carrot family, native to the Middle East. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Ferula negevensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through various methods, including making a decoction by steeping the roots in hot water, or using it as an essential oil in aromatherapy.
